name: Karachi Tech Summit 2026
description: Pakistan's biggest tech conference uniting developers, designers, and startup founders for a full day of talks, workshops, and networking.

name: Creative Design Expo
description: A celebration of graphic design, illustration, and digital art. Browse live portfolios, attend masterclasses, and connect with creative professionals.

name: Startup Pitch Night
description: Watch 10 promising startups pitch live to a panel of top investors. Network with founders, mentors, and VCs shaping Pakistan's startup ecosystem.

name: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering real-world AI applications, model fine-tuning, and building intelligent products. Open to students and professionals.

name: Food & Culture Festival
description: A vibrant outdoor festival celebrating Pakistan's diverse food culture, live music, folk art, and street performances. Family-friendly event.
